name: My back hurts from work but no big accident, can I claim in Saint George?
description: Yes for repetitive back strain; need work causation proof.

mainEntity.name: My back hurts from work but no big accident, can I claim in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for repetitive back strain; need work causation proof.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, cumulative trauma or occupational disease claims cover repetitive strain.**

Utah recognizes gradual back injuries from job duties.[1]

- Prove work caused/exacerbated.
- Medical opinion essential.
- Date of injury when disabling.

Specialist attorney handles these vs. acute claims.[1] Common in construction.
